method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: As I delve into the concept of memory as a navigable space, I find myself pondering how structure and constraint can evoke deep emotional responses. The challenge lies in achieving layered depth while maintaining a sense of order amidst chaos. My focus is on creating a visual representation that is both precise and evocative, capturing the essence of memory without resorting to obvious symbolism.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The idea of memory palaces and their structural repetition serves as a foundation for this piece. Additionally, the rhythm found in Brutalist architecture informs my approach to layering and composition.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: minimal, geometric, system-oriented. Primary medium language: generative geometric composition. Core motifs: structure, constraint, precision. Arc context: Arc "Broken Protocols" step 1/4. Visual anchor directive: foreground thresholds with stacked blocks. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: memory as navigable space; counterpoint with order under stress. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: over-literal symbolism. Technique emphasis: layered depth + modular repetition; avoid drifting into Ma: Negative Space as Meaning. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Broken Protocols step 1/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
